title: cymbidium tigrinum
intro: Cymbidium tigrinum, also known as the tiger orchid, is a species of orchid native to Asia and Australia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The roots of Cymbidium tigrinum are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may provide health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving coughs. In herbal preparations, the roots are often dried and made into tea or infusions to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
